summary: Re-tested FIX 1: Guided Celebration Paths mobile close button. The createPortal fix has been verified working at both 375px and 390px viewports. Button is correctly positioned at bottom:90px from viewport (via position:fixed on document.body portal), above the mobile nav bar, and click-to-close functionality works correctly.
PASSED_tests: FIX 1 (375px POSITION): Button bottom=577px from viewport top. Expected=577px (667-90). Difference=0px. Button IS above nav bar (577 < 597). EXACT match ✅
FIX 1 (390px POSITION): Button bottom=754px from viewport top. Expected=754px (844-90). Difference=0px. Button IS above nav bar (754 < 774). EXACT match ✅

FIX 1 (PORTAL CONFIRMED): portal_check={is_portal:true, btn_grandparent:'BODY', computed_position:'fixed', computed_bottom:'90px', computed_z_index:'9990'}. Button is rendered at document.body level via createPortal ✅
FIX 1 (CLOSE FUNCTIONALITY): JS btn.click() fires → close button removed from DOM (expansion closed) ✅
FIX 1 (INLINE CLOSE): Inline 'Close' button in expansion panel also hides mobile portal close button correctly ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Playwright force=True click on close button showed 'still visible' in one test run, but JS btn.click() confirmed the close works. This discrepancy is likely due to Mira chat widget overlay opening during the test session (not a production bug).
context_for_next_testing_agent: FIX 1 (guided path close button) now VERIFIED PASSING. createPortal renders button at document.body. Position:fixed bottom:90px is now relative to viewport (not parent section). At 375px: button bottom=577px (exact). At 390px: button bottom=754px (exact). Both are above mobile nav bar. Close functionality confirmed. All 4 fixes (FIX 1-4) from iterations 123-124 are now passing.

rca_of_issue.bug: FIX 1 — Guided Path floating close button was positioned relative to transformed parent section (framer-motion CSS transform containment)
rca_of_issue.root_cause: CSS transform on parent section created a new containing block for position:fixed descendants per CSS spec
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: ReactDOM.createPortal renders close button div at document.body level — completely outside any transformed ancestor
rca_of_issue.verified_fix: Portal check confirms btn_grandparent=BODY, computed_position=fixed, computed_bottom=90px, computed_z_index=9990. Button bottom exactly = viewport_height - 90px at both 375px and 390px
